_instructions: Test data catalogue for the api-testing skill. Entries are added via the skill's dataset management workflow — do not edit manually. Each entry is scoped to one endpoint and one scenario type. The 'file_refs' field points to files in the api-testing/assets/ folder.

_asset_files.assets/sample-hair-photo.jpg: Default hair photo for inquiry creation and related endpoints. JPEG format.
_asset_files.assets/sample-passport.png: Default passport scan for logistics flow (Create/Update Passport Details). PNG format.

datasets.description: Standard hair inquiry targeting provider V4 (Toronto Hair Restoration Centre) — used to validate new provider account is reachable

body.problem_details: Moderate crown hair loss over the past 18 months, increasing temple recession.
body.nature_of_concern: Progressive androgenic alopecia, primarily affecting crown and temples.
body.previous_treatments: Minoxidil 5% for 12 months with partial response. Finasteride 1mg for 6 months.
body.lifestyle_factors: Sedentary office work, occasional stress, balanced diet.
body.additional_notes: Interested in FUE method. Prefer minimal downtime.

datasets.notes: scan_url[0][view]=front, scan_url[0][image]=sample-hair-photo.jpg. Targets V4 provider (ba9e7bb4). date_ranges start 30+ days from 2026-04-23. INQUIRY_ID captured for Create Quote dataset.

datasets.description: Quote submitted by provider V4 for an inquiry in requested status — validates V4 can quote, assign clinicians, and set treatment dates

body.note: Toronto Hair Restoration Centre offers a comprehensive FUE package tailored to your hair loss pattern. Our experienced team will guide you through every step.

datasets.notes: Clinician IDs are fixed for V4 (James Tremblay + Emily Chen). location_id=39 = Canada. treatment_dates fall within inquiry date_ranges. QUOTE_ID captured in response.
